statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: A queue of integers as input
statement.outputFormat: True if dequeue operation is valid, False otherwise
statement.notes: Time complexity O(n), Space complexity O(n)

examples.explanation:
Example 1: Dequeue operation from empty queue is invalid
Example 2 to 4: Dequeue operation on a non-empty queue is valid

hints.text: Check the size of the queue before performing dequeue operation

functionSignature.cpp: bool isValidDequeue(int n, int queue[], int k);
functionSignature.java: public boolean isValidDequeue(int n, int[] queue, int k);
functionSignature.python: def isValidDequeue(self, n, queue, k: int) -> bool:
